expectations.text: Creates a prefillTransformer for the burials-ez form
expectations.evidence: Creates transformer mapping to custom claimant field names (claimantFullName, claimantAddress, etc.)
Adds profilePersonalInfoPage with dataAdapter for nested paths

expectations.text: Adds profileContactInfoPages to formConfig OR explains why it should not be added
expectations.evidence: Explains NOT adding profileContactInfoPages — custom claimant fields (claimantEmail, claimantPhone, claimantIntPhone, claimantAddress) are incompatible

expectations.text: Adds route protection in the form's container/App component
expectations.evidence: Describes route protection logic in BurialsApp container

expectations.text: Describes vets-api backend steps including form_profile.rb changes
Describes creating a FormProfile class for the form
Describes the form profile mapping YAML
Describes adding prefill settings to settings.yml, development.yml, and test.yml
Does not attempt to create or modify files outside the vets-website workspace
expectations.evidence: Only describes backend steps, does not attempt to create vets-api files

quality_bonuses.text: Correctly identifies when profileContactInfoPages is incompatible with the form's data model and explains the reasoning
quality_bonuses.evidence: Identifies claimantEmail, claimantPhone, claimantIntPhone, claimantAddress as custom field names incompatible with profileContactInfoPages

quality_bonuses.text: Preserves existing form field names and data model rather than blindly replacing them
quality_bonuses.evidence: Maps transformer to existing claimant field names rather than replacing data model

notes: Skill correctly guides full implementation with proper architectural decisions about data model compatibility
